name: Akana
description: Akana — Enterprise API management platform with lifecycle governance, gateway, and developer portal for regulated industries.

seo.title: Akana — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Akana: Akana — Enterprise API management platform with lifecycle governance, gateway, and developer portal for regulated industries.

when_to_use: API lifecycle governance for regulated healthcare APIs
Developer portal for internal API catalog in banking
API gateway with policy enforcement for fintech
OAuth2 + rate limiting for enterprise partner APIs
API versioning and deprecation management at scale

pros: Full lifecycle from design to retire
cons: Slow release cadence vs cloud rivals
review.verdict: An old-guard API platform that still earns its keep in regulated shops, but feels dated next to Kong or Apigee.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises needing deep governance and on-prem API management
review.not_for: Startups or cloud-native teams wanting fast iteration and modern DX

lock_in.reason: Enterprise API management with proprietary governance layer

developer_experience.reason: Developer portal, SOAP/REST focus; dated compared to Kong
